title: fumaria bracteosa
intro: Fumaria bracteosa is a perennial plant species in the poppy family (Papaveraceae), commonly known as a fumitory or fumary. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fumaria bracteosa include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as digestive problems, including diarrhea and indigestion. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
